items.question: What exactly is One Rooted?
items.answer: One Rooted is a Hiring Operating System — not just another ATS. It connects all your hiring data, workflows, and stakeholders in one intelligent system designed to help you make better hiring decisions faster.

items.question: How is One Rooted different from an ATS?
items.answer: An ATS stores resumes. One Rooted runs your hiring process. It connects candidates, workflows, and decision-makers in real-time with intelligent ranking, automated collaboration, and insights that surface automatically.

items.question: Who is One Rooted built for?
items.answer: Growing teams that hire regularly and want structure without complexity. Whether you're a founder, talent leader, or recruiter — if you're tired of scattered tools and want one shared system, One Rooted is for you.

items.question: Can I use One Rooted with external recruiters or agencies?
items.answer: Yes. Our Partner Portal gives external recruiters their own pipeline view per client. They can submit candidates directly, see real-time status updates, and collaborate without endless email chains.

items.question: How long does it take to get started?
items.answer: Most teams are up and running within a day. No complex migrations, no lengthy onboarding. We'll help you set up your first vacancy and invite your team — it's that simple.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Absolutely. We're fully GDPR compliant, use enterprise-grade encryption, and never share your data. Your hiring data stays yours.

items.question: Can I switch plans later?
items.answer: Yes. Upgrade anytime and get immediate access to new features. Downgrade at the end of your billing cycle. No penalties.

items.question: Is there a minimum contract period?
items.answer: No. All plans are month-to-month with no long-term commitment. We believe in earning your business every month.

items.question: Do you offer discounts for annual billing?
items.answer: Yes — 15% off when you pay annually. Contact our team to set this up.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept all major credit cards, iDEAL, and bank transfers for annual plans. Invoices are sent automatically each billing cycle.

items.question: What happens after my trial or demo?
items.answer: After your demo, you choose a plan that fits your needs. No automatic charges, no hidden conversions. You decide when to start.

items.question: Can I add more users to my plan?
items.answer: All plans include unlimited users. You only pay based on the features and support level you need — not per seat.

items.question: Do you offer custom enterprise pricing?
items.answer: Yes. For organizations with specific needs, we offer custom pricing and dedicated support. Contact us to discuss.

items.question: What's your refund policy?
items.answer: 30-day money-back guarantee on all plans. If you're not satisfied within the first 30 days, we'll refund you in full — no questions asked.

seo.description: Traditional ATS stores CVs, not decisions. One Rooted was built to connect every hiring choice in one system. Our story.

hero.label: Our story
hero.headline: Why we built a
hero.subheadline: Not to add another tool, but to finally make hiring work the way it actually happens.
hero.intro: Hiring software has evolved in features for years. But never in foundation.
hero.introHighlight: That's where we stopped following and started creating.

atsProblem.label: The problem
atsProblem.headline: Why traditional ATS systems fall short

items.title: They're built for storage, not decisions
items.desc: Most ATS systems are advanced databases. They record where candidates are, but not why they should move forward.

items.title: They break the process into pieces
items.desc: Feedback lives in Slack. Decisions in email. Status in spreadsheets. The ATS becomes one silo in a sea of other tools.

items.title: They don't understand collaboration
items.desc: Modern hiring isn't about one recruiter. Founders, hiring managers, team members, and external partners are all involved — but the system doesn't support that.

items.title: They optimize for admin, not outcomes
items.desc: Efficiency is good. But what happens to decision quality, time-to-hire, and candidate experience?

insight.label: The insight
insight.headline: Why hiring needs an Operating System
insight.description: Hiring is no longer a linear process. It's a complex operation with multiple roles, interests, and decisions that directly impact the business.
insight.whatYouNeed: What you need isn't a better tool. What you need is a system that:
needs: supports decisions instead of storing them
insight.conclusion: That's what a Hiring OS does.
insight.conclusionHighlight: Not a feature upgrade. A fundamentally different way of working.
insight.atsDesc: Data sits still. Decisions happen somewhere else.
insight.osDesc: Every action feeds better choices. The system works with you.

origin.label: The origin
origin.headline: How OneRooted came to be

steps.title: The frustration
steps.text: We worked with organizations struggling to hire well, despite having a stack of tools and systems.

steps.title: The realization
steps.text: The problem wasn't a lack of software. The problem was the lack of a coherent system. Everything worked side by side. Nothing worked together.

steps.title: The solution
steps.text: We built OneRooted as the operating system for hiring. One place where everyone collaborates, and where the system actively helps make better decisions.

origin.quote: Not another tool to learn. A system that works the way hiring actually happens today.

howItWorks.punchline: No handovers. No blind spots. No politics.
howItWorks.punchlineDesc: Just transparent collaboration that makes everyone better.

infrastructure.headline: Infrastructure, not competition
infrastructure.description: We're not building another agency tool. We're building the operating system that makes collaboration between clients and recruiters seamless.

items.question: Can I work with multiple clients in One Rooted?
items.answer: Yes. Each client has their own workspace, and you'll have a separate pipeline per client. Everything stays organized and confidential between clients.

items.question: What data can the client see about my work?
items.answer: Clients see the candidates you submit, their status, and performance metrics like time-to-hire and conversion rates. They don't see your internal notes or communication with other clients.

items.question: How do I get started as a recruiter?
items.answer: Your client sends you an invite link. You create an account (takes 30 seconds), and you're immediately connected to their pipeline. No onboarding calls, no setup meetings.

items.question: Is One Rooted trying to replace recruitment agencies?
items.answer: No. We're infrastructure, not competition. One Rooted makes the collaboration between you and your clients smoother. Better tools mean better placements, stronger relationships, and less time wasted on admin.

items.question: Can I still use my own ATS alongside One Rooted?
items.answer: Yes. Many recruiters use their own systems internally and submit candidates to One Rooted for client collaboration. Think of it as the shared workspace where you and your client meet.

seo.title: Privacy Policy | GDPR Compliant
seo.description: How One Rooted collects, uses, and protects your data. Fully GDPR compliant. Encrypted storage, transparent practices.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.content: One Rooted ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our Hiring OS platform and related services.

sections.title: 2. Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including:
items: Account information (name, email address, company name)
Candidate data you upload to the platform

sections.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use the information we collect to:
items: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
Process transactions and send related information
Send technical notices, updates, and support messages
Respond to your comments, questions, and requests

sections.title: 4. Data Security
sections.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest.

sections.title: 5. GDPR Compliance
sections.content: As a company based in the Netherlands, we fully comply with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). You have the right to access, rectify, erase, and port your personal data.

sections.title: 6. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at

seo.title: Terms of Service
seo.description: One Rooted terms and conditions. Your rights and responsibilities when using the Hiring OS platform.

sections.title: 1. Agreement to Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using One Rooted's services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you disagree with any part of these terms, you may not access our services.

sections.title: 2. Description of Service
sections.content: One Rooted provides a Hiring Operating System (Hiring OS) that helps organizations streamline their recruitment processes. Our platform includes candidate tracking, workflow management, collaboration tools, and analytics.

sections.title: 3. User Accounts
sections.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

sections.title: 4. Acceptable Use
items: Use the service for any unlawful purpose
Upload malicious code or attempt to gain unauthorized access
Interfere with or disrupt the integrity of our services

sections.title: 5. Intellectual Property
sections.content: The service and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by One Rooted and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

sections.title: 6. Subscription and Payment
sections.content: Subscription fees are billed monthly or annually, depending on your chosen plan. You may cancel your subscription at any time, and cancellation will take effect at the end of your current billing period.

sections.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: One Rooted shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of or inability to use our services.

sections.title: 8. Changes to Terms
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify users of any material changes via email or through the platform.

sections.title: 9. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at

whyItWorks.title: Why this works
items: Perfect for your first or next hire
Test the system before you scale

items.question: What's in the talent pool?
items.answer: Our talent pool contains 50,000+ actively job-seeking professionals that we've screened on experience, availability, and motivation. You get access to candidates that match your vacancy, with diverse roles from sales to development.

items.question: Can I add my own candidates?
items.answer: Yes, you can add your own candidates in addition to the talent pool. These can be applicants from your website, LinkedIn connections, or referrals. These count towards your limit of 100 candidates.

items.question: What happens after 100 candidates?
items.answer: After 100 candidates, you can upgrade to one of our regular plans (Base, Plus, or Premium) for unlimited candidates. You keep all your data and don't need to set anything up again.

items.question: How do I upgrade to a full plan?
items.answer: You can upgrade at any time via your dashboard. You keep all your data, candidates, and settings. The transition is seamless — you just continue where you left off.

items.question: Is this really the same system as the expensive plans?
items.answer: Yes, 100%. You get exactly the same features, the same interface, the same quality. The only difference is the number of vacancies and candidates. No feature locks, no 'lite' version.

items.question: Can I cancel monthly?
items.answer: Absolutely. Light is month-to-month with no long-term commitment. You can cancel at any time and have access until the end of your billing period.

items.question: What if I need more than 1 vacancy?
items.answer: Then it's time to upgrade to Base (€299/month) for unlimited vacancies. This can be done at any time and your data is preserved.

items.question: How quickly do I get access to the talent pool?
items.answer: Immediately after activation you have full access to the talent pool. You can start searching and receiving matches right away.

items.question: Why is this so affordable?
items.answer: We believe great hiring tools should be accessible to everyone. Light lets you experience the full system at a fraction of the cost, with the option to scale when you need more.

items.question: Do I also get support?
items.answer: Yes, you get email support with response within 24 hours on business days. We're happy to help with questions about the system, your vacancy, or the hiring process.

ats-comparison.metaTitle: ATS Comparison: How to Evaluate Recruitment Software

ats-comparison.shortDescription: Objective ATS comparison without vendor bias.

criteria.title: Speed of adoption
criteria.description: How long until your team actually uses the system? Weeks or months?

criteria.title: Candidate ranking quality
criteria.description: Does it go beyond keyword matching? Does it support structured evaluation?

criteria.title: Workflow flexibility
criteria.description: Can you adjust processes yourself, or do you need consultants?

criteria.title: Total Cost of Ownership
criteria.description: What does it really cost over 3 years, including implementation, training, and support?

criteria.title: Partner collaboration
criteria.description: Can external recruiters work in the same system without license costs?

criteria.title: Reporting depth
criteria.description: Do you get insight out-of-the-box, or do you have to build everything yourself?

solutionPoints: Productive within days, not months
Intelligent ranking that actually differentiates
Self-configurable without dependencies
Transparent TCO without surprises
Built-in partner collaboration

criteria.title: User adoption

criteria.description: How quickly does the system deliver value? Months of implementation is a red flag.

ats-checklist.metaTitle: ATS Checklist: Selection Criteria for the Right Choice
ats-checklist.metaDescription: Free ATS selection checklist. The criteria that really matter when choosing recruitment software — without vendor bias.
ats-checklist.label: ATS Checklist
ats-checklist.headline: ATS Selection
ats-checklist.subheadline: An objective framework for evaluating ATS systems. No marketing, just the questions that matter.
ats-checklist.shortDescription: Download the ATS selection checklist for objective evaluation.
ats-checklist.criteriaHeadline: The checklist vendors don't want you to see

criteria.title: Is the system actually used?
criteria.description: Ask for adoption metrics from existing customers. Features mean nothing if nobody uses them.

criteria.title: How long does onboarding take?
criteria.description: Months is a red flag. A good system is intuitive enough for days, not quarters.

criteria.title: Can you customize workflows yourself?
criteria.description: Or do you need consultants for every change? Flexibility should be in-house.

criteria.title: What does it really cost?
criteria.description: Per-seat? Per-candidate? Implementation fees? Ask for total cost of ownership over 3 years.

criteria.title: How does collaboration with externals work?
criteria.description: Can agencies work in the same system, or does a parallel reality emerge?

criteria.title: What insights do you get out-of-the-box?
criteria.description: Do you have to build reports or do you see bottlenecks automatically?

ats-checklist.solutionHeadline: How OneRooted scores on this checklist
solutionPoints: Adoption within days, not months
Self-configurable workflows without consultants
Transparent pricing without hidden costs
Built-in partner collaboration
Real-time insight without report building
Monthly cancellation, no lock-in

ats-cost-calculator.metaTitle: ATS Cost Calculator: What Does Recruitment Software Really Cost?
ats-cost-calculator.metaDescription: Complete breakdown of ATS costs. Licenses, implementation, training, hidden costs — and how to calculate TCO.
ats-cost-calculator.label: ATS Costs
ats-cost-calculator.headline: What does an
ats-cost-calculator.subheadline: License costs are just the tip of the iceberg. This is the complete breakdown of what recruitment software actually costs.
ats-cost-calculator.shortDescription: Complete guide to ATS costs and total cost of ownership.

criteria.title: Implementation & setup
criteria.description: Often 50-200% of annual license costs. Ask for fixed-price quotes upfront.

criteria.title: Training & onboarding
criteria.description: Hours × people × day rate. The more complex the system, the higher this cost.

criteria.title: Customization & consultancy
criteria.description: Every workflow change, every report, every integration — ask what this costs.

criteria.title: Per-seat licenses
criteria.description: Sounds cheap until your team grows. Calculate to your situation in 3 years.

criteria.title: Per-candidate costs
criteria.description: Volume-based pricing can explode during campaign recruitment.

criteria.title: Exit costs
criteria.description: Data export, contract termination. Ask about migration rights upfront.

solutionPoints: Fixed monthly price from €299 — no per-seat or per-candidate
Implementation included, no setup fees
Unlimited users and candidates
Self-configurable, no consultancy needed
Monthly cancellation, no lock-in
Full support included, no premium tiers

excellent.label: Excellent
excellent.description: This ATS meets virtually all criteria.

good.label: Good
good.description: Solid choice, pay attention to missing must-haves.

acceptable.label: Acceptable
acceptable.description: Important features are missing, consider alternatives.

poor.label: Poor
poor.description: Does not meet basic requirements for a modern ATS.
